response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior engineer with deep open-source involvement, broad technical range, and genuine Linux/architecture experience, but he falls short of this role's hard requirements. German proficiency is listed as 'Basic' against an explicit C1 minimum, and his career is almost entirely senior individual-contributor work — there is no demonstrated track record of leading teams, managing client projects operationally, or executive-level consulting, which are the core of this Head of Development position.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions and founder of an open-source GIS platform, aligning with the company's open-source and digital-sovereignty focus
Broad, modern full-stack and systems experience (Node.js/TypeScript, DLang, C/C++, Linux, Docker, Kubernetes) with a testing/craftsmanship mindset
Proven knowledge-sharing ability through workshops, courses, and conference talks — useful for mentoring
concerns: German listed as 'Basic', well below the required C1 minimum for a client-facing German consulting role
No formal team leadership, tech lead, or project management roles — career is senior IC work
Limited evidence of client advisory, requirements management, UML/modeling, or IT security/compliance experience
